steps.action: Run test: 'should render three time range buttons with 30-day active by default'
steps.expected: Three buttons (7 Days, 30 Days, 3 Months) rendered; 30 Days has 'active' class
steps.observed: Test passed. All three buttons found in DOM; 30-day button confirmed to have 'active' class via toHaveClass assertion.

evidence.testName: should render three time range buttons with 30-day active by default

assertions.title: Switches active time range on click

steps.action: Run test: 'should switch active class to clicked time range button'
steps.expected: Clicking '7 Days' moves active class from '30 Days' to '7 Days'
steps.observed: Test passed. After clicking '7 Days', the 7-day button has 'active' class and 30-day button does not.

evidence.testName: should switch active class to clicked time range button
assertionsChecked: 30-day button does NOT have 'active' class after click

assertions.title: Re-loads data when time range changes

steps.action: Run test: 'should call PerformanceTracker with new range when time range changes'
steps.observed: Test passed. PerformanceTracker.getRecentPerformance called with 30, 7, and 90 in sequence.

evidence.testName: should call PerformanceTracker with new range when time range changes

steps.action: Run test: 'should display completion prediction with date string'
steps.observed: Test passed. Both the label and date string found in the document.

evidence.testName: should display completion prediction with date string

steps.action: Run test: 'should hide prediction section when prediction is Completed'
steps.expected: 'Estimated Completion:' not in document when prediction is 'Completed'
steps.observed: Test passed. queryByText returns null for 'Estimated Completion:'.

steps.action: Run test: 'should hide prediction section when prediction is Unknown'
steps.expected: 'Estimated Completion:' not in document when prediction is 'Unknown'
steps.observed: Test passed. queryByText returns null for 'Estimated Completion:'.

evidence.testName: Two tests: hide prediction for 'Completed' and 'Unknown'
assertionsChecked: 'Estimated Completion:' not in document when prediction='Completed'
'Estimated Completion:' not in document when prediction='Unknown'

steps.action: Run test: 'should render all four chart card headings'
steps.expected: Headings: Progress Over Time, Activity Calendar, Weekly Completion Rate, Confidence Levels
steps.observed: Test passed. All four headings found in document.

evidence.testName: should render all four chart card headings

assertions.title: Passes data to child chart components

steps.action: Run test: 'should pass correct data props to chart sub-components'
steps.expected: ProgressLineChart receives progressData, VelocityBarChart receives velocityData, ConfidenceDistribution receives confidenceData, ActivityHeatmap receives days=30
steps.observed: Test passed. Each mocked chart component received the correct data via JSON.stringify comparison. ActivityHeatmap received '30' as days prop.

evidence.testName: should pass correct data props to chart sub-components

steps.action: Run test: 'should not crash when modules is null'
steps.expected: No crash; tracker methods not called with null modules
steps.observed: Test passed. Component renders without throwing; getRecentPerformance and getWeeklyVelocity not called.

steps.action: Run test: 'should not crash when modules is empty array'
steps.expected: No crash; useEffect returns early for empty array
steps.observed: Test passed. Component renders without throwing; getRecentPerformance not called.

evidence.testName: Two tests: null modules and empty array modules

assertions.title: Catches and logs errors from tracker

steps.action: Run test: 'should catch and log errors when PerformanceTracker throws'
steps.expected: No crash; console.error called with error details
steps.observed: Test passed. render() does not throw; console.error called with 'Error loading performance data:' and the error object.

evidence.testName: should catch and log errors when PerformanceTracker throws
evidence.consoleErrors: Expected console.error call captured via jest.spyOn
assertionsChecked: console.error called with 'Error loading performance data:' message
console.error called with the actual Error object

summary: Tested 9 assertions (VAL-PERFCHARTS-001 through VAL-PERFCHARTS-009): all 9 passed. The PerformanceCharts test file contains 16 tests total (7 additional tests beyond the 9 contract assertions), all passing. Full test suite also passes (426/426 tests, 19 suites).
